Interface BookDao

All Known Implementing Classes:
BookDaoImpl
public interface BookDao
Data Access Object interface for the Book entity.

All implementations must use PreparedStatement exclusively — never string concatenation — to prevent SQL injection.

All write operations (delete(int)) may throw a RuntimeException wrapping a foreign-key violation when the record is still referenced by loans.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(int id)
    Deletes the book with the given id.
    List<Book>
    findAll()
    Returns all books ordered by id ascending.
    List<String>
    findAllGenres()
    Returns distinct genre values present in the database, sorted alphabetically.
    List<Book>
    findByAuthorId(int authorId)
    Returns all books belonging to the given author.
    Optional<Book>
    findById(int id)
    Finds a single book by its primary key.
    void
    insert(Book book)
    Inserts a new book record.
    List<Book>
    search(String text, String genre, Integer yearFrom, Integer yearTo)
    Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
    void
    update(Book book)
    Updates an existing book record identified by book.getId().

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      List<Book> findAll()
      Returns all books ordered by id ascending.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      Optional<Book> findById(int id)
      Finds a single book by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the book ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the book, or empty if not found

    • findByAuthorId

      List<Book> findByAuthorId(int authorId)
      Returns all books belonging to the given author. Used before cascading author delete to build the confirmation message.

    • search

      List<Book> search(String text, String genre, Integer yearFrom, Integer yearTo)
      Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
      • text — case-insensitive LIKE match against title and author.full_name; ignored if blank
      • genre — exact match against genre; ignored if blank
      • yearFrom — pub_year >= yearFrom; ignored if null
      • yearTo — pub_year <= yearTo; ignored if null
      Parameters:
      text - free-text search term (title / author); may be blank
      genre - exact genre filter; may be blank
      yearFrom - lower bound for publication year; may be null
      yearTo - upper bound for publication year; may be null
      Returns:
      matching books ordered by id; never null

    • findAllGenres

      List<String> findAllGenres()
      Returns distinct genre values present in the database, sorted alphabetically. Used to populate the genre filter ComboBox.
      Returns:
      list of genre strings; never null

    • insert

      void insert(Book book)
      Inserts a new book record. The id field of book is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Parameters:
      book - the book to insert (title and authorId must be set)

    • update

      void update(Book book)
      Updates an existing book record identified by book.getId().
      Parameters:
      book - the book with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      void delete(int id)
      Deletes the book with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the book to delete
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the book is referenced by one or more loans (foreign-key violation, SQL state 23503)
